text:
調達してきてくれるの？
ありがとう！　本当に助かるわ！

新作を作るとなると、どうしても
新しい器や調理器具が必要になるのよ。

それで今回お願いしたいのが
包丁の代わりになる刃と
器の代わりになる貝殻なの。

あなたには無茶なお願いばかりだけど
どうか

You'll get those for me? Sweet!
That'll help a lot!

When it comes to new recipes, I absolutely
need to get my hands on new cookware
and cooking utensils.

...Which is why I'm hoping you'll be kind
enough to get me some Sharp Spikes to
use as knives and shells to use as a fancy
kind of receptacle.

I know I'm always asking a lot of you, but...
I know you've got this!
